allow: Bash(find resources/views -name '*.blade.php' -exec sed -i -e 's/sky-50\\b/teal-50/g' -e 's/sky-100\\b/teal-100/g' -e 's/sky-200\\b/teal-200/g' -e 's/sky-300\\b/teal-300/g' -e 's/sky-400\\b/teal-400/g' -e 's/sky-500\\b/teal-500/g' -e 's/sky-600\\b/teal-600/g' -e 's/sky-700\\b/teal-700/g' -e 's/sky-800\\b/teal-800/g' -e 's/sky-900\\b/teal-900/g' -e s/from-cyan-400/from-emerald-500/g -e s/to-cyan-400/to-emerald-500/g -e s/via-cyan-400/via-emerald-500/g -e s/from-cyan-500/from-emerald-500/g -e s/to-cyan-500/to-emerald-500/g -e s/via-cyan-500/via-emerald-500/g -e s/from-cyan-600/from-emerald-600/g -e s/to-cyan-600/to-emerald-600/g -e s/via-cyan-600/via-emerald-600/g -e s/cyan-50/emerald-50/g -e s/cyan-100/emerald-100/g '{}' +)

Bash(py -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile\(r'D:\\xampp\\htdocs\\LK_Healthcare\\LK_Healthcare_Mobile_API_Reference.docx'\); xml=z.read\('word/document.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\); print\('w:p count:', xml.count\('<w:p>'\) + xml.count\('<w:p '\)\)")
PowerShell($ini = \(php --ini | Select-String "Loaded Configuration File"\).ToString\(\); $ini; "GD loaded: " + [bool]\(php -m | Select-String -SimpleMatch "gd"\))

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='php.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'artisan serve' } | ForEach-Object { "Killing PID $\($_.ProcessId\): $\($_.CommandLine\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; "done")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Server UP: " + $r.StatusCode } catch { "Server check: " + $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(php artisan tinker --execute="$u = App\\Models\\User::where\('name','like','%shish%'\)->orWhere\('email','like','%shish%'\)->get\(['id','name','email']\); foreach\($u as $x\){ $hasPatient = App\\Models\\Patient::where\('user_id',$x->id\)->exists\(\); $roles = $x->getRoleNames\(\)->implode\(','\); echo $x->id.' | '.$x->name.' | '.$x->email.' | roles='.$roles.' | patient_row='.\($hasPatient?'YES':'NO'\).PHP_EOL; } if\($u->isEmpty\(\)\) echo 'No user matching ashish found';")
